reference: Hi. This isn't from your infection or your lymph nodes. You may have a pulled neck muscle, but you may also have a disk problem in your neck, so you need to have this evaluated to see if you need a magnetic resonance imaging scan of your neck.
text: Hi. This isn't from your infection or your lymph nodes. You may have a pulled neck muscle, but you may also have a disc problem in your neck, so you need to have this evaluated to see if we need a MRI scan of your neck.
